name: jira-sla-products-ticket-created
description: Triggered by Jira Automation when a new ticket is created in the REQ project. Filters out non-REQ projects and Initiative issue types. Extracts and normalizes ticket data (key, summary, type, status, assignee, timestamps). Determines the responsible party (Producto / IT / Ninguno) based on status. Creates a new row in the SLA Tickets PRODUCTS Notion database (DB 9d4e0a6f) with all fields including the Entered [Status] date field for the initial status.
